name: Data Analyst Pack
author: Analytics Pro
description: Data analysis and insights: SQL generation, data summaries, chart suggestions, anomaly detection.

skills.name: Generate SQL
skills.prompt:
Generate a SQL query for: {{input}}
Output only the SQL with comments.

skills.name: Analyze Data
skills.prompt:
Analyze this data and provide insights, trends, and recommendations:

{{input}}

skills.name: Chart Suggestions
skills.prompt:
Suggest the best chart types and visualizations for this data:

{{input}}

skills.name: Detect Anomalies
skills.prompt:
Identify anomalies, outliers, and unusual patterns in:

{{input}}
